# Light Rental System

> Film lighting equipment rental management platform: Express API + Next.js dashboard + Telegram bot with AI-powered lighting analysis (Gemini) and natural-language booking (GPT-4o-mini). npm workspaces monorepo, SQLite via Prisma, BullMQ job queue.

## Overview

- Monorepo: npm workspaces with 3 apps (`api`, `web`, `bot`) and 1 empty package (`db`)
- Language: TypeScript (ES2022 target, CommonJS modules)
- Total: 85 source files, ~17,800 LOC
- Node.js v20, deployed via GitHub Actions SSH to Ubuntu VPS with PM2

## Core Source

### API (Express 4 + Prisma 6 + BullMQ)
47 source files, ~6,800 LOC

- [apps/api/src/index.ts](apps/api/src/index.ts): Server entrypoint — starts Express on :4000, conditionally starts BullMQ worker if Redis is reachable
- [apps/api/src/app.ts](apps/api/src/app.ts): Express app setup — helmet, CORS, morgan, JSON body parser, centralized error handler (Zod, Prisma, HttpError)
- [apps/api/src/prisma.ts](apps/api/src/prisma.ts): Singleton PrismaClient instance
- [apps/api/src/routes/index.ts](apps/api/src/routes/index.ts): Route registry mounting 19 sub-routers under /api/*
- [apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma](apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma): Database schema — 23 models: User, Analysis, Lead, Client, Equipment, EquipmentUnit, Booking, BookingItem, BookingItemUnit, Estimate, EstimateLine, Payment, Expense, BookingFinanceEvent, AppSetting, SlangAlias, SlangLearningCandidate, ScanSession, ScanRecord, WarehousePin, ImportSession, ImportSessionRow, CompetitorAlias
- [apps/api/prisma/seed.ts](apps/api/prisma/seed.ts): Database seeder

### Web (Next.js 14 + React 18 + Tailwind CSS 3)
26 source files, ~8,700 LOC

- [apps/web/app/layout.tsx](apps/web/app/layout.tsx): Root layout with AppShell wrapper
- [apps/web/app/page.tsx](apps/web/app/page.tsx): Dashboard home — pickups/returns/active ops today (from /api/dashboard/today), MiniCalendar heatmap, QuickAvailabilityCheck widget
- [apps/web/app/api/[...path]/route.ts](apps/web/app/api/[...path]/route.ts): Catch-all API proxy — forwards /api/* to Express backend (port 4000 in dev)
- [apps/web/src/lib/api.ts](apps/web/src/lib/api.ts): `apiFetch` helper with typed error handling
- [apps/web/src/components/AppShell.tsx](apps/web/src/components/AppShell.tsx): Navigation shell — Дашборд (/), Бронирование оборудования (/equipment), Календарь (/calendar), Финансы, Admin; logo href changed to /
- [apps/web/src/components/MiniCalendar.tsx](apps/web/src/components/MiniCalendar.tsx): Month occupancy heatmap (react-day-picker v9, /api/calendar/occupancy)
- [apps/web/src/components/DashboardOpsCard.tsx](apps/web/src/components/DashboardOpsCard.tsx): Booking operation card used in dashboard sections
- [apps/web/src/components/QuickAvailabilityCheck.tsx](apps/web/src/components/QuickAvailabilityCheck.tsx): Availability search widget — hourly-precision datetime-local inputs + category filter, calls /api/equipment with availability params
- [apps/web/next.config.mjs](apps/web/next.config.mjs): Next.js configuration

### Bot (Telegraf 4 + API-backed AI matching)
11 source files, ~2,700 LOC

- [apps/bot/src/index.ts](apps/bot/src/index.ts): Bot entrypoint — Telegraf setup with session, Stage (3 scenes), webhook/polling modes
- [apps/bot/src/services/llm.ts](apps/bot/src/services/llm.ts): Equipment matching via parseGafferReview API (3-tier: resolved/needsReview/unmatched), date parsing
- [apps/bot/src/services/api.ts](apps/bot/src/services/api.ts): HTTP client calling the Express API — includes gaffer review types and parseGafferReview()
- [apps/bot/src/types.ts](apps/bot/src/types.ts): Bot context type definitions (BookingDraft with hub-and-spoke steps, pendingReview state)

## Key Modules

### AI / Vision Pipeline
- [apps/api/src/services/gemini.ts](apps/api/src/services/gemini.ts): GeminiVisionProvider — analyzes film stills via Gemini 2.5 Flash, generates lighting diagrams via Gemini 2.5 Flash Image
- [apps/api/src/services/vision/provider.ts](apps/api/src/services/vision/provider.ts): VisionProvider interface contract
- [apps/api/src/services/vision/index.ts](apps/api/src/services/vision/index.ts): Provider factory (mock or gemini based on VISION_PROVIDER env)
- [apps/api/src/services/vision/mock.ts](apps/api/src/services/vision/mock.ts): Mock vision provider for development
- [apps/api/src/services/vision/types.ts](apps/api/src/services/vision/types.ts): VisionInput and LightingAnalysis types with Zod validation
- [apps/api/src/services/equipmentMatcher.ts](apps/api/src/services/equipmentMatcher.ts): Matches AI-detected equipment to rental catalog (1,092 lines)

### Booking & Estimates
- [apps/api/src/routes/bookings.ts](apps/api/src/routes/bookings.ts): Booking CRUD endpoints
- [apps/api/src/services/bookings.ts](apps/api/src/services/bookings.ts): Booking business logic
- [apps/api/src/services/estimateCalculator.ts](apps/api/src/services/estimateCalculator.ts): Estimate cost calculation
- [apps/api/src/routes/bookingRequestParser.ts](apps/api/src/routes/bookingRequestParser.ts): AI-powered gaffer request parsing

### Export (PDF + XLSX)
- [apps/api/src/services/smetaExport/renderPdf.ts](apps/api/src/services/smetaExport/renderPdf.ts): PDF estimate export via pdfkit (234 lines)
- [apps/api/src/services/smetaExport/renderXlsx.ts](apps/api/src/services/smetaExport/renderXlsx.ts): XLSX estimate export via exceljs (172 lines)
- [apps/api/src/services/smetaExport/buildDocument.ts](apps/api/src/services/smetaExport/buildDocument.ts): Shared document structure builder

### Queue (BullMQ + ioredis)
- [apps/api/src/queue/connection.ts](apps/api/src/queue/connection.ts): Shared ioredis connection (lazy, no auto-reconnect)
- [apps/api/src/queue/analysisQueue.ts](apps/api/src/queue/analysisQueue.ts): Queue definition and job types
- [apps/api/src/queue/analysisWorker.ts](apps/api/src/queue/analysisWorker.ts): Worker — processes photo analysis jobs (vision -> match -> estimate)

### Dashboard & Calendar
- [apps/api/src/routes/dashboard.ts](apps/api/src/routes/dashboard.ts): GET /api/dashboard/today — daily operations summary (pickups, returns, active bookings); optional `?date=YYYY-MM-DD`
- [apps/api/src/routes/calendar.ts](apps/api/src/routes/calendar.ts): GET /api/calendar (resources + booking events with category/search/includeDrafts filters), GET /api/calendar/occupancy (per-day booking heatmap)

### Finance
- [apps/api/src/routes/finance.ts](apps/api/src/routes/finance.ts): Payment and expense endpoints
- [apps/api/src/services/finance.ts](apps/api/src/services/finance.ts): Finance business logic

### Slang Learning
- [apps/api/src/routes/slangLearning.ts](apps/api/src/routes/slangLearning.ts): Admin endpoints for managing gaffer slang aliases
- [apps/api/src/services/pricing.ts](apps/api/src/services/pricing.ts): Pricing service

### Price Import (competitor price analytics)
- [apps/api/src/services/importSession.ts](apps/api/src/services/importSession.ts): Import session lifecycle (985 lines) — XLSX/CSV parsing via exceljs, 4-tier matching (exact → SlangAlias → fuzzy via string-similarity → Gemini AI fallback), diff computation (price/qty changes, new/removed rows), bulk-accept/reject actions, apply with optimistic locking
- [apps/api/src/routes/importSessions.ts](apps/api/src/routes/importSessions.ts): REST API for import workflow (385 lines, 11 endpoints under `/api/import-sessions`) — upload, list, get, rows (paginated+filtered), map columns, match, patch row, bulk-action, apply, export XLSX, delete

### Crew Calculator (shared logic)
- [apps/web/src/lib/crewCalculator.ts](apps/web/src/lib/crewCalculator.ts): Crew cost calculator with overtime tiers (used by web)
- [apps/web/src/lib/crewRates.ts](apps/web/src/lib/crewRates.ts): Role definitions and rate constants
- [apps/bot/src/lib/crewCalculator.ts](apps/bot/src/lib/crewCalculator.ts): Crew calculator copy (used by bot)
- [apps/bot/src/lib/crewRates.ts](apps/bot/src/lib/crewRates.ts): Rate constants copy (used by bot)

### Bot Scenes
- [apps/bot/src/scenes/booking.ts](apps/bot/src/scenes/booking.ts): Hub-and-spoke booking scene (~1000 LOC) — central hub cart, AI free-text matching, inline needsReview confirmations, catalog spoke
- [apps/bot/src/scenes/crewCalc.ts](apps/bot/src/scenes/crewCalc.ts): Crew calculator conversation scene
- [apps/bot/src/scenes/photoAnalysis.ts](apps/bot/src/scenes/photoAnalysis.ts): Photo analysis scene — sends image to API queue

### Web Pages
- [apps/web/app/page.tsx](apps/web/app/page.tsx): Dashboard (home page at /) — three sections (pickups/returns/active), MiniCalendar heatmap, QuickAvailabilityCheck widget
- [apps/web/app/admin/page.tsx](apps/web/app/admin/page.tsx): Admin panel (2,771 lines) — slang learning review, warehouse worker management, cross-catalog barcode management, PricesTab (import session workflow: upload → column mapping → row review with filters → bulk actions → apply)
- [apps/web/app/finance/page.tsx](apps/web/app/finance/page.tsx): Finance dashboard (905 lines) — payments, expenses, reports
- [apps/web/app/bookings/page.tsx](apps/web/app/bookings/page.tsx): Bookings list page
- [apps/web/app/bookings/new/page.tsx](apps/web/app/bookings/new/page.tsx): New booking form
- [apps/web/app/bookings/[id]/page.tsx](apps/web/app/bookings/[id]/page.tsx): Booking detail page
- [apps/web/app/bookings/[id]/edit/page.tsx](apps/web/app/bookings/[id]/edit/page.tsx): Booking edit page
- [apps/web/app/equipment/page.tsx](apps/web/app/equipment/page.tsx): Equipment catalog page
- [apps/web/app/equipment/import/page.tsx](apps/web/app/equipment/import/page.tsx): Equipment XLSX import page
- [apps/web/app/equipment/manage/page.tsx](apps/web/app/equipment/manage/page.tsx): Equipment management page
- [apps/web/app/calendar/page.tsx](apps/web/app/calendar/page.tsx): Equipment availability calendar (680 lines) — desktop grid (equipment rows × day columns, collapsible categories, color-coded occupancy cells) + mobile day-by-day card view; URL params: date, period, category; DRAFT bookings shown but excluded from occupancy counts
- [apps/web/src/components/CalendarTooltip.tsx](apps/web/src/components/CalendarTooltip.tsx): Floating tooltip for calendar cells — shows booking details on hover via @floating-ui/react
- [apps/web/src/lib/calendarUtils.ts](apps/web/src/lib/calendarUtils.ts): `buildOccupancyMap(events, periodStart, periodEnd)` — pure utility building `Map<resourceId-date, OccupancyEntry>`; timezone-safe date iteration; DRAFT status excluded from occupied count
- [apps/web/app/crew-calculator/page.tsx](apps/web/app/crew-calculator/page.tsx): Crew calculator UI
- [apps/web/app/settings/page.tsx](apps/web/app/settings/page.tsx): Settings page

## Configuration

- [package.json](package.json): Root workspace config — concurrently for dev, workspace scripts
- [tsconfig.base.json](tsconfig.base.json): Shared TypeScript config (ES2022, CommonJS, strict)
- [apps/api/package.json](apps/api/package.json): API dependencies — express, @prisma/client, bullmq, @google/generative-ai, zod, pdfkit, exceljs, sharp, multer, string-similarity
- [apps/web/package.json](apps/web/package.json): Web dependencies — next 14, react 18, tailwindcss, react-hook-form, zod, vitest, react-day-picker 9, @floating-ui/react, date-fns 4
- [apps/bot/package.json](apps/bot/package.json): Bot dependencies — telegraf, openai, node-fetch
- [apps/api/.env.example](apps/api/.env.example): Environment template — DATABASE_URL, CORS_ORIGIN, PORT, REDIS_URL, VISION_PROVIDER, GEMINI_API_KEY
- [apps/web/tailwind.config.js](apps/web/tailwind.config.js): Tailwind CSS configuration
- [apps/web/postcss.config.js](apps/web/postcss.config.js): PostCSS configuration

## Testing

- [apps/web/src/lib/crewCalculator.test.ts](apps/web/src/lib/crewCalculator.test.ts): Crew calculator unit tests (209 lines, vitest)
- [apps/api/src/__tests__/calendarUtils.test.ts](apps/api/src/__tests__/calendarUtils.test.ts): `buildOccupancyMap` unit tests — 6 cases covering DRAFT exclusion, timezone-safe date iteration, multi-day events, period clipping (130 lines)
- Test command: `npm test` — 208 tests total (shared + bot + api)

## Infrastructure

- [ecosystem.config.js](ecosystem.config.js): PM2 process config — api (:4000, 512MB) and rental-bot (256MB)
- [deploy.sh](deploy.sh): Shell deploy script — prisma generate/push, tsc build, pm2 reload (supports --api, --web, --rental-bot flags)
- [.github/workflows/deploy.yml](.github/workflows/deploy.yml): GitHub Actions CI/CD — on push to main, SSH to server, git pull, npm install, run deploy.sh

## Optional

- [apps/api/scripts/import-xlsx.ts](apps/api/scripts/import-xlsx.ts): One-off XLSX equipment import script
- [apps/api/scripts/import-svetobaza-estimate.ts](apps/api/scripts/import-svetobaza-estimate.ts): SvetoBaza estimate import script
- [apps/api/scripts/sync-svetobaza-full.ts](apps/api/scripts/sync-svetobaza-full.ts): Full SvetoBaza catalog sync script
- [apps/api/scripts/sync-svetobaza-prices.ts](apps/api/scripts/sync-svetobaza-prices.ts): SvetoBaza price sync script
- [apps/api/assets/fonts/](apps/api/assets/fonts/): DejaVu fonts for PDF export
- [docs/DATA_MODEL_SMETA.md](docs/DATA_MODEL_SMETA.md): Data model documentation for estimates

<!-- updated-by-superflow:2026-04-08 -->
